title: Marqeta's Q2 2025 Earnings Call Highlights Growth and Challenges
text: Marqeta Q2 2025 Earnings Highlights. Key Performance Metrics. Total Processing Volume (TPV): Marqeta reported $91 billion in Q2 2025. This marks a 29% rise compared to the same quarter in 2024. Revenue: The company achieved net revenue of $150 million for Q2, reflecting a 20% year-over-year growth. Profitability: Gross profit reached $104 million, representing a 31% increase from the prior year with a 69% gross margin. Adjusted EBITDA hit an all-time high of $29 million in Q2 2025, with a 19% margin. Strategic Developments: The company completed the TransactPay acquisition on July 31, strengthening its European presence. European operations showed particularly strong momentum, with TPV more than doubling year-over-year across banking and BNPL services. Challenges & Guidance: Marqeta narrowly missed GAAP profitability and faced delays in two key customer contract renewals, now expected later in 2025. Despite these headwinds, the company raised full-year guidance for revenue growth, gross profit growth, and adjusted EBITDA margin by 3-4 percentage points, demonstrating management confidence in sustained business momentum.
